jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at EaseMyTrip
jsonLd.description:
EaseMyTrip invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
